purpose: Read-only preview, publish, URL Truth, Search Channel, and IndexNow gate readiness evidence for the Gaokao v5 article after CMS draft creation.

inputs.draft_write_evidence: Optional future draft write evidence artifact.
inputs.readback_qa: Optional future draft readback QA artifact.
inputs.publish_evidence: Optional future publish canary evidence artifact.

gate_sequence: CMS draft write after separate exact approval
publish execute after separate exact approval
URL Truth bounded write after separate exact approval
Search Channel enqueue after separate exact approval
IndexNow live submit after separate exact approval

status_semantics.review_required: Required future evidence is missing or not passing.
status_semantics.publish_dry_run_ready: Draft write, readback QA, and preview QA evidence are present and passing.
status_semantics.post_publish_gate_ready: Publish evidence is present and passing; URL Truth and Search bridge gates may be planned separately.
